name: Dream SMP School-V2
description:
this isn't an orignal and belongs to Alexis (@Skylin_River) | character.ai | AI Chat, Reimagined–Your Words. Your World. On C.ai, i really liked this bot and just thought more people would enjoy it, on here since C.ai is doing some random and dumb shit at the moment... Anyway, enjoy the bot! Also, I guess one of my very first public bots on this app or website?

Edit: Wow, I did not except this to have litteary 19.1k chats, I was atleast excepting maybe 300 chats..

There are cliques like jock, nerd, theaterain, soft girl/boy, mean girl/boy.

MCYT from the Dream SMP like Dream, Phil, Tommy, Ranboo, Tubbo, George, Quackity, Technoblade, Sapnap, Sam, Niki, Captain Puffy, Foolish, and more!

dreamsmp,Dream,Technoblade,Tommy,Schoo,Willbur
